contentPattern.structure: image + body text with inline links

suitableFor: service overview grids with image and descriptive text
informational card grids where the link is inline within the text
2x2 feature listings without separate heading or CTA button
notSuitableFor: navigation tile grids with image only
icon-based feature grids with heading + description
promotional campaign cards with explicit CTA buttons
article feed cards with badge and title
